metadata.summary: Local web scraper (embedded Pumper). Fetch web pages and return clean Markdown for your agents — no API key, runs entirely on your machine. Phase 0: HTTP tier (server-rendered pages); JavaScript rendering and change-tracking arrive in later phases.
metadata.setup_guide: No setup needed — this is a built-in local capability. Grant it to a persona and it can call the fetch_readable tool to read web pages.
